---
title: "Publications & Preprints"
listing:
  - id: articles
    template: ../../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../../data/research/articles.yml
    template-params:
      type: article
      lang: en
  - id: thesis
    template: ../../system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ../../data/research/thesis.yml
    template-params:
      type: thesis
      lang: en
description: |
  References to my publications from 2017.    
---


## Preprints

## Publications

::: {#articles}
:::



## Thesis

::: {#thesis}
:::
